nasb.text: Does the snow of Lebanon forsake the rock of the open country? Or is the cold flowing water from a foreign land ever snatched away?

esv.text: Does the snow of Lebanon leave the crags of Sirion? Do the mountain waters run dry, the cold flowing streams?

cnv.text: 黎巴嫩山上巖石的積雪融化過嗎？ 從遠處流下清涼的溪水乾涸過嗎？

ccb.text: 黎巴嫩山岭上的积雪会融化吗？ 从远方流来的冰凉溪水会停止吗？
